title: Flirting with Fate
writer: Daniel Jarrett, A. Dorian Otvos, Joseph Moncure March
actors: Joe E. Brown, Leo Carrillo, Beverly Roberts
plot: A show troupe led by Dan Dixon and traveling in a trailer is stranded in Paraguay. Dan is all set to be booked in the theatres controlled by Don Luis Garcia until Garcia discovers that Dan is the man who caused him much trouble in...
